rationale: Educ. Code §12.110 governs charter school application procedures. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative overlap with this statute.
quote:
Sec. 12.110. APPLICATION. (a) The commissioner shall adopt:
(1) an application form and a procedure that must be used to apply for a charter for an open-enrollment charter school; and
(2) criteria to use in selecting a program for which to grant a charter.
_note: No conflict. The rule cited concerns charter school applications and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
